pkgmetadata.longdescription: rinoh-typeface-texgyrecursorThis package provides the TeX Gyre Cursor_ typeface for use with rinohtype_.TeX Gyre Cursor is based on URW Nimbus Mono L and can be used as a replacementfor Courier... _TeX Gyre Cursor httpwww.gust.org.plprojectse-foundrytex-gyrecursor.. _rinohtype httpsgithub.combrechtmrinohtypereadme
